mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_STOCK (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, S_GOODS_ID, S_WAREHOUSE_ID, I_QTY, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{sGoodsId}, #{sWarehouseId}, #{iQty}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_GOODS_ID, S_WAREHOUSE_ID, I_QTY, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_STOCK WHERE S_GOODS_ID = #{goodsId} AND S_WAREHOUSE_ID = #{warehouseId}

SELECT S_ID, S_GOODS_ID, S_WAREHOUSE_ID, I_QTY, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_STOCK
ORDER BY DT_UPDATE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
